case_title: TOMAS PENA VS. GLEN A. CLARK

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARK, GLEN A. $1,942.91 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,032.91, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,136.08 *DEFICIT: $13.74* AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, GLEN A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,942.91 FILED BY PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, GLEN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($40.00) SERVED DEC-06-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, GLEN A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, GLEN A.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, GLEN A.
